form.formComment: At the latest run ran last in a small field at this track on March 21 over 1300m, on rain affected going; 15 len behind El Congo with 56kg at $10. The start before that ran on from midfield and won by a 0.1 len at this track February 22 over 1200m defeating Gran Campero carrying 56kg at $4.30. Won?t spend a penny in the run from the inside stall. Good each-way hope.
